calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-31-2020 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-20-2019 Set For Trial On Sep-21-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-10-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFFS GENOVEVA BAUTISTA, MARIA BAUTISTA's DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT, as follows:

Plaintiffs Genoveva and Mary Bautista's demurrer to Defendants Jamie Weston and Eric Gigliotti's answer is overruled in its entirety. The primary function of the answer is to give the other party notice so that it may prepare its case. (Harris v. City of Santa Monica (2013) 56 Cal.4th 203, 240.) A purported defect in a pleading that otherwise gives notice to the other side cannot be said to affect substantial rights or cause prejudice. (Id.) If, after a reasonable opportunity for discovery and factual investigation, Plaintiffs contend that Defendants lack factual support for some or all of the affirmative defenses, Plaintiffs should request that Defendants withdraw those affirmative defenses. If Plaintiffs are dissatisfied by the response, then they may bring a summary adjudication motion seeking to eliminate the affirmative defenses lacking factual support.

Counsel for Defendants is to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling and submit it in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
